sentences.pinyin: Wǎn shang hǎo! Nǐ zài zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: Good evening! What are you doing?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我在做饭。今天想试试做红烧鱼。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài zuò fàn. Jīn tiān xiǎng shì shi zuò hóng shāo yú.
sentences.text_translation: Ovqat pishiryapman. Bugun qizil sousdagi baliqni sinab ko'rmoqchiman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я готовлю. Сегодня хочу попробовать сделать рыбу хуншао.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm cooking. Today I want to try making red-braised fish.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ huì zuò fàn ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Can you cook?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Huì yì diǎn. Wǒ gāng gāng kāi shǐ xué.
sentences.text_translation_en: A little. I just started learning.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Xū yào wǒ bāng máng ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you need my help?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好啊！你可以帮我洗菜和切菜吗？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a! Nǐ kě yǐ bāng wǒ xǐ cài hé qiē cài ma?
sentences.text_translation: Mayli! Sabzavot yuvish va to'g'rashda yordam bera olasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо! Можешь помочь мне помыть и нарезать овощи?
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure! Can you help me wash and cut the vegetables?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Kě yǐ. Yào qiē shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure. What should I cut?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Qiē yì xiē cōng, jiāng hé suàn.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz ko'k piyoz, zanjabil va sarimsoq to'g'ra.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нарежь немного зелёного лука, имбиря и чеснока.
sentences.text_translation_en: Cut some scallions, ginger, and garlic.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de. Yú mǎi le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. Did you buy the fish?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Mǎi le. Zài bīng xiāng lǐ.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. It's in the fridge.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hái xū yào bié de cài ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do we need any other dishes?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 再做一个西红柿炒鸡蛋，一个青菜。
sentences.pinyin: Zài zuò yí ge xī hóng shì chǎo jī dàn, yí ge qīng cài.
sentences.text_translation: Yana bitta pomidorli qovurilgan tuxum va bitta ko'k sabzavot qilamiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё сделаем яичницу с помидорами и зелёные овощи.
sentences.text_translation_en: Let's also make tomato scrambled eggs and a green-vegetable dish.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 西红柿炒鸡蛋我喜欢吃！
sentences.pinyin: Xī hóng shì chǎo jī dàn wǒ xǐ huan chī!
sentences.text_translation_en: I love tomato scrambled eggs!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ zuò duō yì diǎn.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll make a bit more.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yòng shén me tiáo liào?
sentences.text_translation_en: What seasonings do you use?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yòng yán, jiàng yóu hé táng.
sentences.text_translation: Tuz, soya sousi va shakar ishlataman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Использую соль, соевый соус и сахар.
sentences.text_translation_en: Salt, soy sauce, and sugar.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Yú yào zhǔ duō jiǔ?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long does the fish need to cook?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Dà gài èr shí fēn zhōng.
sentences.text_translation_en: About twenty minutes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Fàn zhǔ le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is the rice cooking?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hái méi. Wǒ xiàn zài zhǔ fàn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ещё нет. Я сейчас поставлю рис.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not yet. I'll cook the rice now.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你做的菜闻起来好香啊！
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuò de cài wén qǐ lái hǎo xiāng a!
sentences.text_translation: Sen pishirgan taomning hidi juda xushbo'y-ku!
sentences.text_translation_en: The food you're making smells so good!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 马上就好了。你尝一尝吧！
sentences.pinyin: Mǎ shàng jiù hǎo le. Nǐ cháng yi cháng ba!
sentences.text_translation_en: It'll be ready in a moment. Have a taste!
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo chī! Nǐ zhēn lì hai!
sentences.text_translation_en: Delicious! You're really good!
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢！以后我可以教你做菜。
sentences.pinyin: Xiè xie! Yǐ hòu wǒ kě yǐ jiāo nǐ zuò cài.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat! Keyinchalik senga ovqat pishirishni o'rgataman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо! В будущем я могу научить тебя готовить.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thanks! I can teach you to cook sometime.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Wǒ yào gēn nǐ xué.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! Я буду учиться у тебя.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! I'll learn from you.
sentences.speaker: A
